summary: Comprehensive testing of Draft / For Preparation workflow (iteration 250). Backend: 14/14 pytest tests pass against live API. Frontend: all 8 UI checks confirmed via Playwright. Draft Orders button in toolbar, Prepare Order button in both Quick Sale and Detailed Sale modes, Draft Orders dialog with empty state, FOR PREPARATION badge in TransactionSearchPage, and print button labels all verified.
critical_code_review_comments: Prepare Order button correctly disabled (not just hidden) when cart is empty — good UX. Quick Sale: disabled={cart.length === 0 || preparingOrder}, Detailed Sale: disabled={!lines.some(l => l.product_id) || preparingOrder}
Draft button shows 'Update Draft' text when activeDraftId is set (editing existing draft) — clean UX feedback

FOR PREPARATION banner in PrintEngine.js orderSlipFullPage() correctly uses isDraft = inv.status === 'for_preparation' with amber banner text 'FOR PREPARATION ONLY / NOT YET PAID — NOT A FINAL RECEIPT'

ReferenceNumberPrompt renders 4 print buttons: 8.5x11 Inkjet / Standard (data-testid=print-full-page-btn), 8.5x11 Dot Matrix (data-testid=print-dot-matrix-btn), Thermal 58mm (data-testid=print-thermal-btn), Send to Branch Printer (data-testid=remote-print-btn)
draft_orders.py router registered in main.py at line 236 — all 5 CRUD endpoints live
test_credentials: Org admin: test_org_admin@regression.local / RegressionPass!2026 (backend tests). Super admin: janmarkeahig@gmail.com / Aa@58798546521325 (sales page UI). Note: super admin cannot see tenant-scoped search results (cross-tenant privacy fix iter 180); use org admin for FOR PREPARATION badge verification.
seed_data_creation: Backend test creates and cancels draft orders on Branch 1 (c435277f-9fc7-4d83-83e7-38be5b4423ac). Drafts created with customer_name='TEST_Draft_Customer' and 'TEST_Cancel_Draft'. All are cleaned up in fixture teardown via DELETE. A test Walk-in draft (SI-XX-001066) remains visible in org admin search confirming FOR PREPARATION badge.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Draft Orders workflow (POST/GET/PATCH/DELETE /api/draft-orders) is fully implemented and tested. Backend 14/14 pass. Frontend elements confirmed: toolbar Draft Orders btn (data-testid=draft-orders-btn), cart Prepare Order btn (data-testid=prepare-order-btn), dialog (data-testid=draft-orders-dialog), FOR PREPARATION badge in TransactionSearchPage, 4 print buttons in ReferenceNumberPrompt. Demo env has no products so Prepare Order flow (cart → API call → dialog) cannot be tested end-to-end from UI without products.
rca_of_the_issue: No bugs found. Fresh feature implementation verified clean.
